children.heading: .—Simplified Acquisition Threshold
children.label: a .—Simplified Acquisition Threshold
children.text: For purposes of acquisitions by agencies named in , the simplified acquisition threshold is as specified in .section 3063 of this titlesection 134 of title 41

children.heading: .—Inapplicable Laws
children.label: b .—Inapplicable Laws
children.text: No law properly listed in the Federal Acquisition Regulation pursuant to shall apply to or with respect to a contract or subcontract that is not greater than the simplified acquisition threshold.section 1905 of title 41
